title: Design & Implement VPC Network Architecture
description: Develop Terraform modules for VPC with 3 Availability Zones, public/private subnet isolation, NAT Gateways, and Route Tables.
acceptance_criteria: VPC created with non-overlapping CIDR; Subnets across 3 AZs; NAT Gateways active

title: EKS Cluster Control Plane Provisioning
description: Configure EKS cluster resource, enable control plane logging, map IAM roles to Kubernetes RBAC.
acceptance_criteria: EKS Active; Control plane logging enabled; OIDC provider configured

title: Worker Node Group & Autoscaler Setup
description: Define managed node groups with launch templates. Install Cluster Autoscaler and AWS Load Balancer Controller via Helm provider.
acceptance_criteria: Nodes joined; Cluster Autoscaler running; ALB Controller active

title: AI Worker Service Scaffold & SQS Consumer
description: Initialize NestJS microservice. Implement SQS message listener using long-polling. Configure Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) handling logic.
acceptance_criteria: Service consumes SOW_UPLOADED messages; DLQ routing functional

title: Stripe Service Adapter & Payment Intent Creation
description: Implement Stripe SDK wrapper. Create method to generate PaymentIntent based on Invoice entity. Handle customer creation/retrieval.
acceptance_criteria: PaymentIntent created; Stripe Customer linked; Client Secret returned

title: Implement PII Sanitization with AWS Comprehend
description: Fetch document from S3. Convert to text. Call AWS Comprehend to identify PII entities. Redact identified entities with placeholders.
sprint_goal: Enable Core Logic: AI Extraction & Secure Payments
acceptance_criteria: Text extracted; PII redacted; Sanitized file uploaded to S3

title: OpenAI Structured Data Extraction Logic
description: Construct prompt with sanitized text. Call OpenAI API to extract JSON schema (Skills, Scope, Deliverables). Validate output against Zod schema.
sprint_goal: Enable Core Logic: AI Extraction & Secure Payments
acceptance_criteria: Valid JSON output; Zod validation passes; 429 errors handled

title: Secure Webhook Endpoint with Signature Verification
description: Create NestJS controller for webhooks. Implement middleware to validate `Stripe-Signature` header using raw request body.
sprint_goal: Enable Core Logic: AI Extraction & Secure Payments
acceptance_criteria: Invalid signatures rejected (400); Raw body preserved

title: Payment Success Handler & Idempotency Logic
description: Implement logic for `payment_intent.succeeded` event. Check for existing transaction ID (idempotency). Update Project status to 'Active'.
sprint_goal: Enable Core Logic: AI Extraction & Secure Payments
acceptance_criteria: Idempotency verified; Transactional updates; Ledger entry created
